description:
Legal documents, four entries on the recto and verso. Possibly drafts from a court notebook, including one completely crossed out. Location: Cairo. Dated in multiple entries as Kislev 5479/התע׳׳ה AM (= November/December CE). The clearest instance of the ע/70 ligature appears in the first entry, line 11r, and the full year is written out in line 24r. The document entries appear as follows: (1) Investment partnership in which Menaḥem b. Moshe Ṣarfati receives a sum of Seville-minted reales (ריאליס שיבילייאנוס) from Ḥanuna wife of Shemuʾel M[asʿū]d(?); (2) Real estate rental arrangements related to a two-structure residence in Cairo where Naḥmia b. Moshe Saragosi resides with his unnamed son and daughter. Naḥmia Saragosi is renting the property from a non-Jewish property owner (והיה פורע שכירות - מידו ליד הגוי בעל המלך, l. 17r), possibly the Ottoman military officer Ibrāhīm Ağa ʿAzbān mentioned in the interlinear addition in line 16r. (3) Revised version of the previous document entry with fewer interlinear additions and corrections. 

Verso: (4) A partnership document between Yaʿaqov b. Raḥamim ha-Levi and Yiṣḥaq b. Yaʿaqov Reʾuven in "the ṣarf business" (ṣarrāflık activities). Although they are not listed explicitly as partners, Naḥmia b. Moshe Saragosi and his wife Habība/Ḥavīva bt. Yaʿaqov Skandarī contribute funds to the business venture. Various witnesses are listed for each entry, most notably, Ḥayyīm Ben-Hini, who was presumably the scribe for the fragment based on ס׳׳ו in his signatures (סופר ועד). MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
